title: Party Bag Fillers,36 PCS Fidget Toys , 3x3cm Mini Square Keyrings with Beaded Chains, Class Gifts from Teacher, Fidget Keyrings for Stress Relief ,Christmas Party Bag Fillers(Assorted Colors)
features: Engaging Fidget Toys for Kids: These party bag fillers for kids mini square keyrings provide a fun and interactive way to help children focus and relieve stress; The compact size makes them ideal for little hands to carry and play with anywhere
Durable and Safe Design: Made from high-quality materials, these fidget keyrings are sturdy and safe for children; The smooth edges and lightweight construction ensure a comfortable grip

Assorted Colors and Beaded Chains: Each set includes 36 mini square keyrings in random colors, each with a beaded chain for easy attachment to backpacks or belts; The vibrant colors add a playful touch
Compact and Portable: Measuring 3x3x1 cm, these fidget toys are small enough to fit in pockets or pencil cases; The lightweight design makes them convenient for kids to carry around all day
description: 36 PCS Fidget Toys for Kids, 3x3cm Mini Square Keyrings with Beaded Chains, Class Gifts from Teacher, Party Bags for Kids Party, Fidget Keyrings for Stress Relief (Assorted Colors) Engaging Fidget Toys for Kids: These mini square keyrings provide a fun and interactive way to help children focus and relieve stress; The compact size makes them ideal for little hands to carry and play with anywhere Durable and Safe Design: Made from high-quality materials, these fidget keyrings are sturdy and safe for children; The smooth edges and lightweight construction ensure a comfortable grip Perfect for Various Occasions: Great as class gifts from teachers to reward students or as party bags for kids parties; These keyrings are also suitable for travel and daily use to keep kids entertained Assorted Colors and Beaded Chains: Each set includes 36 mini square keyrings in random colors, each with a beaded chain for easy attachment to backpacks or belts; The vibrant colors add a playful touch Compact and Portable: Measuring 3x3x1 cm, these fidget toys are small enough to fit in pockets or pencil cases; The lightweight design makes them convenient for kids to carry around all day
